entry.title: New: Bill 5 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, APPENDIX A, PART I, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, PRIVATE DONATIONS" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget relating to "Private Donations" received in the amount of $6,040.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
